Mini Retractor Hardware Specifications & Features

Our Mini Retractor Hardware provides a compact, professional solution for portable banner displays at trade shows, events, and business presentations. This lightweight aluminum hardware system offers reliable performance in a space-saving design.

Key Features & Benefits

  • Durable aluminum base construction for long-lasting performance
  • Lightweight and portable design at just 1.5lbs total weight
  • Shock cord pole system folds completely into base for compact storage
  • Easy setup and breakdown for frequent event use
  • Compatible with custom banner printing (banner sold separately)

Product Dimensions & Specifications

  • Display Size: 9.38" W x 17.5" D x 4" D when assembled
  • Weight: 1.5 pounds for easy transport
  • Material: High-grade aluminum construction
  • Storage: Compact folding design fits in carrying case
  • Setup: Tool-free assembly in minutes

This mini retractor hardware is ideal for tabletop displays, small event spaces, and situations where portability is essential. The shock cord pole system ensures quick setup while the aluminum base provides stable support for your custom banner.

Frequently Asked Questions About Mini Retractor Hardware

What is included with the Mini Retractor Hardware?

The Mini Retractor Hardware includes the aluminum base, shock cord pole system, and banner attachment clips. Custom banners are sold separately and must be ordered to complete your display setup.

How much does the Mini Retractor Hardware weigh?

The complete hardware system weighs just 1.5 pounds, making it extremely portable for trade shows, events, and frequent transport between locations.

What size banners work with this hardware?

The Mini Retractor Hardware is designed for tabletop-sized banners. Contact our customer service team for specific size recommendations and banner compatibility information.

Is assembly required for the Mini Retractor Hardware?

No tools are required for assembly. The shock cord pole extends from the aluminum base and banners attach with the included clips. Setup takes just minutes.

Can I use this hardware outdoors?

The Mini Retractor Hardware is designed primarily for indoor use and covered outdoor applications. The lightweight design may not provide sufficient stability in windy outdoor conditions.

How compact is the storage when not in use?

The shock cord pole retracts completely into the aluminum base, creating a compact storage footprint. The entire unit measures 9.38" W x 17.5" D x 4" D when stored.

What production time should I choose?

Choose 2-day express for urgent needs, 3-day standard for most orders, or 5-day saver to reduce costs when timing is flexible. All options include quality construction and careful packaging.

Can I order custom banners at the same time?

Yes! Contact our customer service team to coordinate your Mini Retractor Hardware order with custom banner printing for a complete display solution.
